raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint is based on Federal Regulation Z compliance. 

I gave a resort hotel my credit card to " hold '' as a security deposit. Nothing was supposed to be charged. After attending various seminars sponsored by the resort, I was given a certificate for a credit toward the hotel cost. Upon presenting the certificate at check out, the hotel charged {$2.00} after application of the resort credits. I signed for the {$2.00} and left. 

When I received the bill, the hotel charged {$1000.00} but I did not authorize the charge. I did not sign for the charge. I filed a chargeback with the credit card company, AMEX. The credit card company did not communicate with me about the chargeback, but closed the matter. The hotel did not produce a signed receipt or any other evidence demonstrating I had authorized any charge except {$2.00}.
